content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(i) WARN — Privacy policy states "We do not collect, process, or store your location data" but RunSessionManager.swift imports CoreLocation, requests whenInUse authorization, and actively records GPS route data (App/RunSessionManager.swift:1-14), directly contradicted also by the app description's "maps every run with GPS" claim.
Pierre: Apple reviewers cross-check the privacy policy text against actual app behavior, and a flat denial of location collection while shipping a CLLocationManager-based GPS tracking feature is a direct, easily-caught contradiction. This will likely trigger a rejection or clarification request under 5.1.1 for misleading privacy disclosures. Fix by updating the privacy policy to accurately describe GPS/location collection, retention, and any sync/iCloud storage, and ensure the App Privacy "Location" nutrition label matches.
